title: Enhanced Efficiency
description: A  modpack that aims to drastically improve the game's performance and adds a ton quality of life features for the best Minecraft experience.
body:
# Features of this modpack
  **Enhanced Efficiency** aims to improve the game's performance especially on lower end devices and adds a **LOT** of quality of life features that will give you the best minecraft experience you can ever imagine. This modpack is a great alternative to Optifine and other performance enhancing modpacks. Here are some features that Enhanced Efficiency provides:

- Improved performance and better visuals
- Sound physics
- Screenshot viewer IN GAME
- Talk bubbles when chatting
- Custom skyboxes support
- Eating animations
- Dynamic lighting
- Browse all resource packs, data packs and shaders on modrinth or curseforge IN GAME with [Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify)
- Zoom feature with Zoomify
- Ambient sounds, block placing sounds, walking sounds, and more
- 3D Skins
- Seamless loading screen when loading/joining a game
- First person model
- Player animations
- Memory leak fixes
- Tips when loading the game
- Dynamic lights
- Controller support
- And so much more


## What are the mods included in this modpack?
https://rentry.co/fyde7 Updated as of 8/15/23
